label: Otayori Route
targetUser: Parent or local resident handling a long school or civic notice.
userMoment: After receiving a notice and before deciding who needs to do what.
roles: Triage: turns source text into practical next actions
Explainer: keeps evidence and uncertainty understandable
Validation worker: checks static-data boundary and MVP Contract
process: Research and concept selected Otayori Route from the school notice action-routing idea
Agent router assigned Triage and Explainer
Requirements defined a one-screen source-to-action workspace
Builder materialized source, metadata, manifest, sample data, and validation files
Reviewer passed the materialized artifact and Publisher marked it as local publish candidate
architecture: Local React state: filter, selected card, and ready/follow-up marks
Artifact Store: README, metadata, manifest, source, and validation evidence
No external API, secret, login-only flow, paid API, or external publishing dependency
mockups: Workspace: source notice on the left, action cards and filters on the right
Evidence panel: selected card source quote, materials, and uncertainty
Review state: ready/follow-up/unreviewed counters update from user input
sourcePlan: Keep the artifact inspectable before DB/feed automation
Register as a Prodia Project using existing Project/Artifact rows
Expose pipeline evidence from Source and Run surfaces

sourceProvenance.sourceProductUsed: p0_pipeline_evidence_20260627T120000 requirements -> builder -> reviewer -> publisher chain

sourceEvidenceAudit.usePolicy: Use only as a static sample-data provenance record; human review is required before live notice handling.

sourceProvenance.antiCloneBoundary: This artifact demonstrates source-linked action routing from a static sample notice; it does not claim an official school workflow or live external integration.
sourceProvenance.sourceBoundary: The UI and sample data are materialized from the local LLM pipeline run and bundled static files only.

interactionProofPlan.initialState: Review summary starts with zero ready items and all actions unreviewed.
interactionProofPlan.expectedState: Clicking Mark ready updates the review summary and the card status text.

interestingness: It demonstrates that Prodia can turn a dense real-world-style notice into an inspectable, interactive action artifact while preserving provenance and uncertainty.
productConceptSource: p0_pipeline_evidence_20260627T120000 requirements -> builder -> reviewer -> publisher chain

sourceFiles.purpose: Explain the Otayori Route artifact, intended user, static data boundary, and human-review limits.
Describe the concept, selected agents, template pattern, and MVP Contract for validation.
Render the one-screen workspace with source notice, action cards, filters, and review state.
Hold static sample notice text and extracted action candidates.
Record initial self-review against the P0 MVP criteria.

demo.purpose: Inspectable placeholder for submission/demo review before UI wiring.

readiness.firstScreenValue: The intended first screen shows the notice, extracted actions, and uncertainty queue together.
readiness.coreInteraction: A user filters action cards, selects one to inspect evidence, and marks review status.
readiness.stateChange: Filter and status selections change the visible cards and review summary.
readiness.inspectableOutput: README, metadata, sample data, source placeholder, and self-review are all declared.
readiness.staticDataBoundary: No external API, login, upload, school system, or paid service is required.
readiness.remainingWeakness: Needs materialization into a concrete artifact directory and UI smoke verification.

mvpContract.firstScreenValue: Source notice, action cards, and unresolved questions are visible without navigation.
mvpContract.coreInteraction: Select/filter action cards and mark them ready or needs follow-up.
mvpContract.stateChange: The selected evidence panel and review status update from user input.
mvpContract.inspectableOutput: README, metadata, source, static sample data, and validation files explain the artifact.

implementationNotes: Use the source_to_mission template pattern: source material on the left, mission/action cards on the right, evidence visible on selection.
Keep interaction local and stateful: filters and ready/follow-up markings are enough for P0.
Represent uncertainty as a first-class queue instead of smoothing it into confident advice.
Materialization should create a static artifact bundle before DB Project registration.
knownRisks: This response is not yet a compiled runnable artifact.
The placeholder page content must be replaced during materialization.
A real-world notice workflow needs stronger privacy and official-source guardrails before use.

dbWrite.reason: BuildPlan materialization is artifact-only for this session. Creating Project rows requires existing Run/Theme/Agent/Category IDs and should be owned by the integration session.
